REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO DECLARE PLTF JANET STANFORD A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT; REQUEST FOR PREFILING ORDER AND REQUIRING PLTF TO FURNISH SECURITY FILED BY DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS - HUMAN RESOURCES

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS', HUMAN RESOURCES, MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF JANET STANDFORD A VEXTOUS LITIGANT; REQUEST FOR PREFILING ORDER AND ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE COURT DECLARES PLAINTIFF TO BE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391(B)(1) AND (B)(3). THERE IS NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT PLAINTIFF WILL PREVAIL IN THIS LITIGATION. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FURNISH SECURITY WITH THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 15, 2007 OR THIS ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT ENTERS A PRE-FILING ORDER PROHIBITING PLAINTIFF FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN PROPERIA PERSONA WITHOUT FIRST OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-03-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Declare Pltf Janet Standford A Vextous Litigant;Request For Prefiling Order And Order Rquiring Plff To Furnish Security
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Khalad Taqi-Eddin, Esq. of Buty & Curliano LLP, 510-267-3000 for defendant and moving party Kaiser Foundation Hospitals, Human Resources

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS', HUMAN RESOURCES, Motion To Declare PLAINTIFF Janet Standford A Vextous Litigant; Request For Prefiling Order And Order Requiring PLAINTIFF To Furnish Security IS GRANTED. THE COURT DECLARES PLAINTIFF TO BE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391(B)(1) AND (B)(3). THERE IS NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT PLAINTIFF WILL PREVAIL IN THIS LITIGATION. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FURNISH SECURITY WITH THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 15, 2007 OR THIS ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT ENTERS A PRE-FILING ORDER PROHIBITING PLAINTIFF FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN PROPERIA PERSONA WITHOUT FIRST OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (302/PJM)
